song_name: Hold Me Thrill Me Kiss Me Kill Me

versions.song_name: Hold Me Thrill Me Kiss Me Kill Me

tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb

pro_brother.song_name: Hold Me Thrill Me Kiss Me Kill Me

content:
Tuning: 1/2 Step Down ([ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch])

(The intro guitar track is performed with a     
Digitech Whammy-Wah pedal (the early version of the GP-100))
(The 'A' 'G' 'B' 'A(2)' 'F'  and 'G(2)' chords are always done on a 12-string
acoustic throughout the whole song, while the 'B5' 'A5' 'F5' and 'G5' are
always electric. 
On the chorus; The powerchords ('B5' 'A5' 'F5' and 'G5') 
are doubled by their full-chord equivalents ('B' 'A(2)' 'F'  and 'G(2)') 
on acoustic. 
All Chords can be backed by 12-string Acoustic playing the same chord, minus the chorus)

[Electric]
[Verse Chords]
[ch]E5[/ch] 022xxx   [ch]Bb5[/ch]  688xxx
[ch]G5[/ch] 355xxx   [ch]A5[/ch]   577xxx
 
[For 12-String Acoustic]
[Chorus Chords] 
[ch]B[/ch]  799877   [ch]A[/ch](2) 577655
[ch]F[/ch]  133211   [ch]G(2)[/ch] 355433

[Rhythm Guitar]
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E5[/ch]

[tab][ch]E5[/ch]
You just know what you got[/tab]
[tab][ch]E5[/ch]
Oh honey you been stealing from the thieves[/tab]
[tab][ch]E5[/ch]
And you got caught[/tab]
[tab][ch]E5[/ch]     [ch]A5[/ch]               [ch]G5[/ch]       
In the headlights, of a stretch car[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]       [ch]E5[/ch]
You're a star[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E5[/ch]

[tab][ch]E5[/ch]

[tab][ch]E5[/ch]

[tab][ch]E5[/ch]

Our love...
You don't have...
Hold me
Thrill me
Kiss me
Kill me
